testcase.name: Health check
Create a user with a data table
Create a user without required fields
Duplicate email is rejected
List users with pagination
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: List users with pagination Given the API server is running ... passed in 0.018s And the users database is empty ... passed in 0.019s Given the following users exist: ... passed in 0.014s | name | email | role | | User 1 | u1@example.com | viewer | | User 2 | u2@example.com | viewer | | User 3 | u3@example.com | viewer | When I send a GET request to "/api/users?page=1&limit=2" ... passed in 0.028s Then the response status should be 200 ... passed in 0.000s And the response should contain at most 2 items ... passed in 0.000s And the response field "total" should be 3 ... passed in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Get a user by id
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: Get a user by id Given the API server is running ... passed in 0.003s And the users database is empty ... passed in 0.042s Given a user exists with email "getme@example.com" ... passed in 0.007s When I send a GET request to the created user endpoint ... passed in 0.007s Then the response status should be 200 ... passed in 0.001s And the response field "email" should be "getme@example.com" ... passed in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Delete a user returns 204
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: Delete a user returns 204 Given the API server is running ... passed in 0.004s And the users database is empty ... passed in 0.011s Given a user exists with email "deleteme@example.com" ... passed in 0.016s When I send a DELETE request to the created user endpoint ... passed in 0.004s Then the response status should be 204 ... passed in 0.001s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Get a non-existent user returns 404
Role-based user creation -- @1.1
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario Outline: Role-based user creation -- @1.1 Given the API server is running ... passed in 0.004s And the users database is empty ... passed in 0.004s When I send a POST request to "/api/users" with: ... passed in 0.007s | field | value | | name | Admin 1 | | email | admin1@example.com | | role | admin | Then the response status should be 201 ... passed in 0.000s And the response field "role" should be "admin" ... passed in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Role-based user creation -- @1.2
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario Outline: Role-based user creation -- @1.2 Given the API server is running ... passed in 0.006s And the users database is empty ... passed in 0.031s When I send a POST request to "/api/users" with: ... passed in 0.004s | field | value | | name | Editor 1 | | email | edit1@example.com | | role | editor | Then the response status should be 201 ... passed in 0.000s And the response field "role" should be "editor" ... passed in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Role-based user creation -- @1.3
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario Outline: Role-based user creation -- @1.3 Given the API server is running ... passed in 0.005s And the users database is empty ... passed in 0.009s When I send a POST request to "/api/users" with: ... passed in 0.010s | field | value | | name | Viewer 1 | | email | view1@example.com | | role | viewer | Then the response status should be 201 ... passed in 0.000s And the response field "role" should be "viewer" ... passed in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
